caption: A man with a tall, silver-grey hairstyle, wearing glasses, black headphones, a white shirt, a red and white bow tie, and gold suspenders, is positioned in a studio setting. He is seated facing a black microphone on a stand, appearing to be in the middle of a conversation. In the background, a woman with pink hair wearing a green dress stands partially visible. The background also features a wall with a sign that reads "UNIQUE FASHIONS" and a framed picture of a gold shield. On-screen text displays "BOSS TALK 101" and a logo that says "BOSS TALK PODCAST." Across the sequence of frames, the scene remains largely static, with only slight shifts in the man's facial expression and head posture as he speaks.
